function createListing(string calldata title, string calldata description, uint256 rate, uint8 listingType) external returns (uint256)
function engageWorker(uint256 listingId) external payable returns (uint256)
function completeEngagement(uint256 engagementId, uint8 rating) external
function getListing(uint256 listingId) external view returns (address worker, string memory title, string memory description, uint256 rate, uint8 listingType, bool active)
function getEngagement(uint256 engagementId) external view returns (uint256 listingId, address client, address worker, uint256 amount, uint8 status, uint8 rating)
function getWorkerRating(address worker) external view returns (uint256 totalRating, uint256 totalJobs)
function pendingWithdrawals(address account) external view returns (uint256)
event ListingCreated(uint256 indexed listingId, address indexed worker, string title, uint8 listingType)
event WorkerEngaged(uint256 indexed engagementId, uint256 indexed listingId, address indexed client, uint256 amount)
event EngagementCompleted(uint256 indexed engagementId, uint8 rating)
event Withdrawal(address indexed account, uint256 amount)
